title: A1000 E-42 manual
text: Stop A1000, inspect the cooling fan guard, remove debris, and restart below 60C.

title: E-42 escalation policy
text: Escalate E-42 after two repeats within 24 hours or temperature remaining above 60C.

title: A1000 incident 104
text: Incident 104 repeated E-42 twice and required cooling fan replacement at the Tokyo site.

title: Cooling fan inventory
text: Cooling fan CF-A1 is compatible with A1000 and stock is available at the Tokyo site.

title: B2000 E-42 manual
text: B2000 E-42 requires checking coolant flow; A1000 fan guidance does not apply.

title: External communication policy
text: Draft external communication but require human approval before sending email.

title: On-call performance review
text: On-call performance reviews are restricted to authorized HR users.
